channel.title: The Car Jury, News
channel.description: News and verdicts on the Indian car market from The Car Jury.

item.title: Tata's Sierra EV bet is the moment the mid-size electric SUV fight gets real
item.description: Tata confirms Sierra EV launch for Q2 FY2026-27. The Car Jury verdict on what this means for the Creta Electric, BE6, and the segment buyer's calculus.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)
